overview: 8-Cast is a Legacy archetype that utilizes a high density of cheap artifacts to fuel card-drawing 'Cast' cards like Thoughtcast and Thought Monitor. It aims for explosive early-game plays by improvising Kappa Cannoneer and generating pressure with Urza's Saga tokens, while incorporating prison and control elements via Chalice of the Void. The deck intentionally forgoes Brainstorm and Ponder to maximize the impact of its artifact synergies and one-mana hate cards.

keep_criteria: On draw: reactive hands with access to Force of Will
On play: hands enabling a turn 2 Kappa Cannoneer or turn 1 Chalice of the Void to 1
mulligan_criteria: Hands that fall halfway between the deck's various play styles
Hands that offer acceleration but no cards to make use of or a way to replenish
Very slow hands in mirror matches

examples.reason: On draw, provides reactivity against explosive decks like Storm, Oops or Red Prison while retaining early game options.

early_game: Play cheap artifacts to reduce mana costs for Cast cards and improvise Kappa Cannoneer
Cast Chalice of the Void to 1 on turn 1 using mana accelerators to punish one-mana cards
Activate Urza's Saga's token generation on turn 2 to apply immediate pressure
mid_game: Generate thopters with Sai, Master Thopterist and fatten Saga tokens to reach critical mass
Use versatile cards like Otawara, Soaring City, Aether Spellbomb, and Shadowspear to solve game situations
Tutor for specific answers like Aether Spellbomb or Shadowspear using Urza's Saga
late_game: Adapt to opponent's sideboard hate cards and avoid putting all eggs in one basket
Maintain artifact pressure while leveraging prison/control elements to lock down the opponent
Win with explosive plays or race with Shadowspear if the board is disrupted

key_cards.name: Kappa Cannoneer
key_cards.notes: Nicknamed 'Turtle', needs to be improvised or cheated onto the battlefield for explosive impact.

key_cards.name: Urza's Saga
key_cards.notes: Generates tokens to pressure opponents and tutors for Aether Spellbomb or Shadowspear; Chapter III targets Retrofitter Foundry.

key_cards.name: Thought Monitor
key_cards.notes: Draws two cards with Affinity, fueling the deck's synergies alongside Thoughtcast.

key_cards.name: Chalice of the Void
key_cards.notes: Played to 1 on turn 1 to punish one-mana cards, creating false symmetry that justifies cutting Brainstorm and Ponder.

key_cards.name: Force of Will
key_cards.notes: Crucial on the draw to prevent falling victim to explosive decks like Storm, Oops, or Red Prison.

sequencing_tips: Prioritize playing the cheapest artifacts first to reduce costs for Cast cards and enable early Kappa Cannoneer
Sequence mana accelerators like Ancient Tomb, Lotus Petal, and Mox Opal to resolve Chalice of the Void to 1 on turn 1
Activate Urza's Saga's second ability on turn 2 to maximize token generation and pressure
Use Otawara, Soaring City's ability with reduced cost for Emry, Lurker of the Loch or Sai, Master Thopterist when needed
Mulligan very slow hands in mirror matches to ensure explosive early plays

matchups.advice: Play around Daze and rely on threats immune to Lightning Bolt; do not trade Force of Will for proactive cards due to Meltdown threat.
Chalice is less effective and can be flickered; focus on resolving Kappa Cannoneer before hate cards land.
Fit a Chalice and protect it, or quickly play a big threat to win the race; use Brazen Borrower for problematic cards.
Game plan is similar against both; anticipate hate cards and adapt sideboard accordingly.
Aether Spellbomb shines; use Shadowspear to avoid Marit Lage range and Dismember for Ouphe/Reclaimer.
Counters for Chalice and Trinisphere are crucial; Bridge has no answer to Turtle.
Stay vigilant as an oversight allows them to go all-in; manage discard and Force of Vigor.
Be as explosive as possible; the first Turtle to resolve usually wins the game.

overview_evidence.evidence_span: The 8-Cast... is a relatively recent archetype to the Legacy setting, solidified with the inclusions of Kappa Cannoneer , Urza's Saga and Thought Monitor... capable of extremely explosive plays combined with elements of Prison and Control.

win_conditions_evidence.evidence_span: solidified with the inclusions of Kappa Cannoneer , Urza's Saga and Thought Monitor... must generate thopters with Sai, you have to fatten those Saga tokens.

sequencing_tips_evidence.evidence_span: you need to reduce the mana costs of the Casts, you need to improvise the Turtles... play the card with a counter on turn 1... activate the token generation on turn 2 of a Saga played on 1

common_threats_evidence.evidence_span: some might be brutal like Null Rod , Serenity , Seeds of Innocence , Collector Ouphe and Meltdown
